# Candle Lighting

[Back to all zmanim](index.md)

## Candle Lighting

Candle lighting time for any day of the week, including Yom Tov on a weekday.

Calculated as the candle-lighting offset in minutes before sea-level sunset. Elevation adjustments are not included.

The time depends on the candle-lighting offset setting.

The time may not be available in places or dates where the needed sunset calculation cannot be computed, such as in the Arctic Circle where there is at least one day a year when the sun does not set.

??? info "Technical details"
    Source method: `ZmanimCalendar.getCandleLighting`

    Technical reference: `com.kosherjava.zmanim.ZmanimCalendar.getCandleLighting`
